mapper.select: SELECT D.DEPT_ID AS id ,D.DEPT_NM AS text ,IFNULL(D.UP_DEPT_ID, '#') AS parent ,D.CO_ID AS coId ,D.SORT_SEQ AS sortDeptSeq ,D.DEPT_SE_CD AS deptSeCd ,D.USE_YN AS useYn FROM dept_info D WHERE D.CO_ID = #{coId} AND D.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY D.UP_DEPT_ID ASC, D.SORT_SEQ ASC

SELECT D.DEPT_ID ,D.CO_ID ,D.DEPT_NM ,D.UP_DEPT_ID ,D.SORT_SEQ ,D.DEPT_SE_CD ,D.DEPT_EXPLN ,D.MNGR_USER_ID ,D.USE_YN ,D.REG_DT ,PD.DEPT_NM AS UP_DEPT_NM ,M.USER_NM AS MNGR_USER_NM ,M.JBPS_NM AS MNGR_JBPS_NM FROM dept_info D LEFT JOIN dept_info PD ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = PD.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN user_info M ON D.MNGR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE D.DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND D.CO_ID = #{coId}

SELECT C.CO_ID AS coId ,C.CO_NM AS coNm ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM dept_info D WHERE D.CO_ID = C.CO_ID AND D.USE_YN = 'Y') AS orgCnt ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_info U WHERE U.CO_ID = C.CO_ID AND U.USE_YN = 'Y') AS memberCnt ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_info U LEFT JOIN dept_info D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID AND D.CO_ID = U.CO_ID AND D.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE U.CO_ID = C.CO_ID AND U.USE_YN = 'Y' AND D.DEPT_ID IS NULL) AS unassignedCnt FROM co_info C WHERE C.CO_ID = #{coId} AND C.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT D.DEPT_ID ,D.CO_ID ,D.DEPT_NM ,D.UP_DEPT_ID ,D.SORT_SEQ ,D.DEPT_SE_CD ,D.DEPT_EXPLN ,D.MNGR_USER_ID ,D.USE_YN ,D.REG_DT ,PD.DEPT_NM AS UP_DEPT_NM ,M.USER_NM AS MNGR_USER_NM ,M.JBPS_NM AS MNGR_JBPS_NM ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_info U WHERE U.CO_ID = D.CO_ID AND U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID AND U.USE_YN = 'Y') AS MEMBER_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM dept_info C WHERE C.CO_ID = D.CO_ID AND C.UP_DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID AND C.USE_YN = 'Y') AS CHILD_CNT FROM dept_info D LEFT JOIN dept_info PD ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = PD.DEPT_ID AND PD.CO_ID = D.CO_ID LEFT JOIN user_info M ON D.MNGR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID AND M.CO_ID = D.CO_ID WHERE D.CO_ID = #{coId} AND D.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CASE D.DEPT_SE_CD WHEN 'HQ' THEN 1 WHEN 'DEPT' THEN 2 WHEN 'TEAM' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END ,D.SORT_SEQ ASC ,D.DEPT_NM ASC

SELECT U.USER_ID ,U.USER_NM ,U.CO_ID ,U.DEPT_ID ,D.DEPT_NM ,U.JBPS_NM FROM user_info U LEFT JOIN dept_info D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID AND D.CO_ID = U.CO_ID AND D.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE U.CO_ID = #{coId} AND U.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IFNULL(D.SORT_SEQ, 9999), U.USER_NM, U.USER_ID
